creator: andreas@knobel.gun.de
text:
People ask in Usenet, how to configure remoteprinting successfully
	having a hosts.lpd(5) manpage and some references to it from
	within lpd(8) might help here.

Fix: 

I suggest to add a link to this manpage under
"SEE ALSO" in printcap(5) and lpd(8)

.Dd Mai 1996
.Dt HOSTS.LPD 5
.Os FreeBSD
.Sh NAME
.Nm hosts.lpd
.Nd trusted hosts that may use local print services
.Sh DESCRIPTION
The
.Nm hosts.lpd
file contains a list of hostnames or IP addresses
that are allowed to use your local print services.
List every hostname or IP address on a line itself.
.Sh FILES
.Bl -tag -width /etc/hosts.lpdxxxxx -compact
.It Pa /etc/hosts.lpd
The
.Nm hosts.lpd
file resides in
.Pa /etc .
.Sh SEE ALSO
.Xr printcap 5 ,
.Xr lpd 8 .
